name: Snake-Eyes Diabellstar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>蛇眼の大炎魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スネークアイズ・ディアベルスター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an attack is declared involving this card and an opponent's monster: You can place this card from the field, and that opponent's monster, face-up in their owners' Spell & Trap Zones as Continuous Spells. While this card is a Continuous Spell: You can target 1 FIRE monster in your GY, except "Snake-Eyes Diabellstar"; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eyes Diabellstar" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When an attack is declared involving this card and an opponent's monster: You can place this card from the field, and that opponent's monster, face-up in their owners' Spell & Trap Zones as Continuous Spells. While this card is a Continuous Spell: You can target 1 FIRE monster in your GY, except "Snake-Eyes Diabellstar"; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eyes Diabellstar" once per turn.
eff: When an attack is declared involving this card and an opponent's monster: You can place this card from the field, and that opponent's monster, face-up in their owners' Spell & Trap Zones as Continuous Spells. While this card is a Continuous Spell: You can target 1 FIRE monster in your GY, except "Snake-Eyes Diabellstar"; place it face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, and if you do, Special Summon this card. You can only use each effect of "Snake-Eyes Diabellstar" once per turn.

action: Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from the opponent's field in the opponent's Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
